data.title: Nexus Industrial REIT Announces Fourth Quarter and Year End 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Shifted focus to solely industrial real estate investment trust (REIT); Successfully finalized several appealing development projects; Reported robust leasing activities and deals.

data.title: Governing Body at LAX Calls on Flying Food Group to Respond to Safety Concerns Following Fire, Says UNITE HERE Local 11
data.description: Los Angeles World Airports (LAWA) has initiated a probe into Flying Food Group due to multiple concerns, including a recent fire incident on January 22, 2026, the second in four months at the facility. The investigation focuses on possible violations of the company's permit and the airport's Contractor Responsibility Policy. LAWA has officially requested Flying Food Group to address various allegations accumulated over several years, which also include reported Cal/OSHA complaints.

US TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT ANNOUNCES THAT THE US WILL PROVIDE A 30-DAY WAIVER TO LET INDIAN REFINERS BUY RUSSIAN OIL, HELPING KEEP OIL SUPPLY STABLE IN THE WORLD MARKET
US TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT STATES THAT THIS TEMPORARY MEASURE WILL NOT GIVE THE RUSSIAN GOVERNMENT A BIG FINANCIAL GAIN BECAUSE IT ONLY ALLOWS DEALS WITH OIL ALREADY STOPPED AT SEA.

data.title: Securities Transactions by Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities under Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 on market abuse
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Tenaris S.A. (NYSE: TS, Mexico: TS, Italy: TEN) issued a notification in compliance with Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 on market abuse and relevant Luxembourg laws. The company disclosed receiving a securities transaction notification from a individual with managerial responsibilities. The notification has been submitted to the Luxembourg Commission de Surveillance du Secteur Financier and the Luxembourg Stock Exchange. Detailed information on this transaction can be viewed at https://www.bourse.lu/oam-search.

data.title: Badger Delivers Solid Growth in 2025, and Announces Record Fleet Build for 2026
data.description: Calgary, Alberta, March 05, 2026 - Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. (TSX:BDGI) released their financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and the full year. The company presented all figures in U.S. dollars.

data.title: Traction Uranium Announces Share Consolidation
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 05, 2026, Traction Uranium Corp. (CSE: TRAC) (OTC: TRCTF) (FRA: Z1K) disclosed that following the news release from February 17, 2026, the company will consolidate its issued and outstanding common shares. The consolidation will be conducted at a ratio of one post-consolidation common share (a “Post-Consolidation Share”) for every three existing common shares. The record date for this consolidation is set for March 11, 2026.

data.title: Conexus Brings Its Office of the CFO Talent Platform to the East Coast with New York and Connecticut Launch
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Conexus, a rapidly expanding firm specializing in interim and executive human capital solutions for the Office of the CFO, revealed the establishment of its inaugural East Coast branches in New York and Connecticut. The firm's growth initiative includes the appointment of new leadership for the expansion.

data.title: Yellow Stripes Capital Acquires Majority Stake in NoblQ to Power Global AI‑Led Expansion
data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that Yellow Stripes Capital (YSC), a private investment firm located in Dublin, Ohio, has successfully obtained a majority stake in NoblQ, a rapidly expanding global digital transformation organization. This partnership marks a significant development for NoblQ, positioning them as a leader in the industry of AI-enabled technologies.

data.title: Film Director Mike Wicklein To Be Awarded the Nora Roberts Foundation Award at March 26th Opening Night of the Maryland International Film Festival-Hagerstown
data.description: In Hagerstown, Maryland on March 5, 2026, the prestigious Maryland International Film Festival-Hagerstown revealed that celebrated documentary filmmaker Mike Wicklein is set to receive the Nora Roberts Foundation Award during the inauguration of the 14th installment of the festival.

data.title: Dr. Sheel Desai Solomon and Preston Dermatology Continue Awards Streak with Top Honors in 2026 Maggy Awards
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, Dr. Sheel Desai Solomon, MD, FAAD, a board-certified dermatologist, along with her practice, Preston Dermatology & Skin Surgery Center, achieved notable success in the 2026 Maggy Awards by Cary Magazine. They were honored with two distinguished awards, securing the top spot with a Gold award for Best in their category.

data.title: Strike Receives BitLicense and Money Transmitter License from the New York Department of Financial Services
data.description: In New York City, Strike, a prominent Bitcoin financial services firm, has obtained both a BitLicense and a Money Transmitter License from the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS). This development permits Strike to provide its range of Bitcoin solutions to residents and businesses throughout New York state. Known globally as the financial hub, New York's regulatory standards are considered one of the strictest in the world.

data.title: SNOOZ Launches Go 2: The Next Generation 3-in-1 Portable Sleep Machine
data.description: In Las Vegas, SNOOZ unveiled the SNOOZ Go 2, the latest version of its popular sound machine, integrating a sound machine, Bluetooth speaker, and night light in a portable design. Travel Insomnia is a common issue as per IHG study where 80% of travelers experience poorer sleep due to noise. The Go 2 aims to address this concern, offering a solution for better sleep on the go.

data.title: Les Schwab Announces Leadership Transition, Building on a Trusted 74-Year Legacy
data.description: Tom Nolan has been appointed as the new CEO and Chairman of the Board of Les Schwab Tire Centers, a prominent independent tire retailer in the US. The announcement was made on March 5, 2026, in Bend, Ore. Nolan will lead the company in enhancing operational efficiency and creating value. Les Schwab is known for its strong presence in the market and customer base, with a significant number of retail stores across the nation. This strategic move aims to drive further growth and success for the company under Nolan's leadership.
